## Setup

```{r}
initialise_environment <- function() {
  required_packages <- c(
    "arrow",
    "here",
    "rio",
    "dplyr",
    "stringr",
    "tidyr",
    "reclin2",
    "data.table",
    "igraph"
  )
  invisible(lapply(required_packages, library, character.only = TRUE))
}
initialise_environment()
```

## Load Data

```{r}
path_sales <- here::here("data", "processed", "house_price.parquet")
sales_og <- import(path_sales)
```

## Sales

### Address Normalisation

```{r}
clean_basic <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_to_upper() %>%
    str_replace_all("\\s+", " ") %>%
    str_squish() %>%
    na_if("")
}

normalise_postcode <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_to_upper() %>%
    str_replace_all("\\s+", "") %>%
    na_if("")
}

```

### Prepare Clean Data

```{r}
rent_dt <- as.data.table(sales_og)

rent_dt[, `:=`(
  date_of_transfer = as.IDate(date_of_transfer),
  price = as.numeric(price),
  postcode_clean = normalise_postcode(postcode),
  paon_clean = clean_basic(paon),
  saon_clean = clean_basic(saon),
  street_clean = clean_basic(street)
)]

rent_dt[,
  simple_key := {
    if_else(
      !is.na(postcode_clean) & !is.na(paon_clean),
      paste(postcode_clean, paon_clean, saon_clean, street_clean, sep = "|"),
      NA_character_
    )
  }
]

rent_dt[grepl("^(NA\\|)*NA$", simple_key), simple_key := NA_character_]
```

### Exact Repeat Transactions

```{r}
setorder(rent_dt, simple_key, date_of_transfer, transaction_id)

rent_dt[
  !is.na(simple_key),
  `:=`(
    sale_sequence = seq_len(.N),
    sale_count = .N,
    lag_date = shift(date_of_transfer),
    lag_price = shift(price)
  ),
  by = simple_key
]

rent_dt[
  !is.na(simple_key),
  `:=`(
    holding_period_days = as.numeric(date_of_transfer - lag_date),
    price_change = price - lag_price,
    pct_change = data.table::fifelse(
      !is.na(lag_price) & lag_price > 0,
      price / lag_price - 1,
      NA_real_
    )
  )
]

repeat_sales_exact <- rent_dt[!is.na(simple_key) & sale_count > 1]
repeat_sales_exact <- as_tibble(repeat_sales_exact)
```

### Exact Repeat Coverage

```{r}
sale_count_summary_dt <- rent_dt[!is.na(simple_key), .N, by = simple_key][,
  .(sale_count = N),
  by = simple_key
]


total_properties <- nrow(sale_count_summary_dt)

repeat_summary_exact <- sale_count_summary_dt[,
  .(
    n_properties = .N,
    share_properties = .N / total_properties
  ),
  by = sale_count
][order(sale_count)]

repeat_summary_exact <- as_tibble(repeat_summary_exact)

repeat_summary_exact
```


### Sales: Fuzzy Matching

#### Prepare for reclin2 Matching

```{r}
rent_dt[,
  group_exact := fifelse(!is.na(simple_key), .GRP, NA_integer_),
  by = simple_key
]

sales_linkage_dt <- rent_dt[, .(
  house_id,
  transaction_id,
  date_of_transfer,
  price,
  postcode_clean,
  paon_clean,
  saon_clean,
  street_clean,
  property_type,
  old_new,
  duration,
  longitude,
  latitude,
  simple_key,
  group_exact
)]

text_fields <- c("paon_clean", "saon_clean", "street_clean")
sales_linkage_dt[,
  (text_fields) := lapply(.SD, function(x) fifelse(is.na(x), "", x)),
  .SDcols = text_fields
]
```

#### Candidate Pairs via reclin2

```{r}
pairs <- pair_blocking(
  sales_linkage_dt,
  on = "postcode_clean",
  deduplication = TRUE
)

# candidate pairs
reclin2::compare_pairs(
  pairs,
  on = c("paon_clean", "saon_clean", "street_clean"),
  default_comparator = reclin2::cmp_jarowinkler(0.9),
  inplace = TRUE
)
```

#### Score Pairs

```{r}
# Estimate match probabilities using EM algorithm
model <- reclin2::problink_em(
  ~ paon_clean + saon_clean + street_clean,
  data = pairs
)

# Classify pairs as matches/non-matches based on probabilities
pairs <- predict(model, pairs, type = "mpost", add = TRUE)
```

#### Select pairs

```{r}
# Select pairs based on weights/probabilities
threshold_weight <- 0.75
selection_var <- "ntom"

setorder(pairs, -mpost, .x, .y)

pairs_selected <- reclin2::select_greedy(
  pairs = pairs,
  variable = selection_var,
  score = "mpost",
  threshold = threshold_weight,
  n = 10L,
  m = 10L
)
```

#### Link data

```{r}
# Create the linked dataset using selected pairs
linked_data_set <- reclin2::link(
  pairs_selected,
  selection = selection_var,
  keep_from_pairs = c(".x", ".y", "mpost", selection_var)
)

linked_data_set[,
  match_exact := fifelse(
    !is.na(simple_key.x) & !is.na(simple_key.y) & simple_key.x == simple_key.y,
    1L,
    0L
  )
]

# Reorder columns so .x and .y variables are next to each other
x_cols <- names(linked_data_set)[grepl("\\.x$", names(linked_data_set))]
y_cols <- names(linked_data_set)[grepl("\\.y$", names(linked_data_set))]
other_cols <- names(linked_data_set)[
  !grepl("\\.(x|y)$", names(linked_data_set))
]

# Create pairs of x and y columns
base_names <- unique(gsub("\\.x$", "", x_cols))
paired_cols <- c()
for (base in base_names) {
  x_col <- paste0(base, ".x")
  y_col <- paste0(base, ".y")
  if (x_col %in% x_cols && y_col %in% y_cols) {
    paired_cols <- c(paired_cols, x_col, y_col)
  }
}

# Add any remaining x or y columns that didn't have pairs
remaining_cols <- c(
  x_cols[!x_cols %in% paired_cols],
  y_cols[!y_cols %in% paired_cols]
)

# Reorder the dataset
column_order <- c(other_cols, paired_cols, remaining_cols)
linked_data_set <- linked_data_set[, column_order, with = FALSE]

linked_data_set |>
  filter(
    date_of_transfer.x != date_of_transfer.y,
    match_exact == 0L,
    saon_clean.x == saon_clean.y
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(mpost)) |>
  head(10000) |>
  View()
```

### Build Property Panel

```{r}
threshold_fuzzy <- 0.7

if (!"flagged_fuzzy" %in% names(rent_dt)) {
  rent_dt[, flagged_fuzzy := FALSE]
}

rent_dt[,
  property_id := fifelse(
    !is.na(group_exact),
    sprintf("exact_%07d", group_exact),
    NA_character_
  )
]

fuzzy_edges <- linked_data_set[
  mpost >= threshold_fuzzy,
  .(from = transaction_id.x, to = transaction_id.y, mpost)
]

if (nrow(fuzzy_edges) > 0) {
  g <- igraph::graph_from_data_frame(
    fuzzy_edges[, .(from, to)],
    directed = FALSE
  )
  comps <- igraph::components(g)

  component_map <- data.table(
    transaction_id = names(comps$membership),
    fuzzy_component = comps$membership
  )

  component_ids <- merge(
    component_map,
    rent_dt[, .(transaction_id, property_id)],
    by = "transaction_id",
    all.x = TRUE
  )

  resolved_ids <- component_ids[,
    {
      existing_ids <- unique(na.omit(property_id))

      if (length(existing_ids) == 1L) {
        .(property_id = existing_ids, needs_review = FALSE)
      } else if (length(existing_ids) > 1L) {
        .(property_id = existing_ids[1L], needs_review = TRUE)
      } else {
        .(
          property_id = sprintf("fuzzy_%07d", fuzzy_component[1L]),
          needs_review = FALSE
        )
      }
    },
    by = fuzzy_component
  ]

  component_map <- merge(
    component_map,
    resolved_ids,
    by = "fuzzy_component",
    all.x = TRUE
  )

  rent_dt <- merge(
    rent_dt,
    component_map[, .(
      transaction_id,
      property_id_fuzzy = property_id,
      needs_review
    )],
    by = "transaction_id",
    all.x = TRUE
  )

  rent_dt[
    !is.na(property_id_fuzzy),
    flagged_fuzzy := fifelse(needs_review, TRUE, flagged_fuzzy, na = FALSE)
  ]

  rent_dt[
    is.na(property_id) & !is.na(property_id_fuzzy),
    property_id := property_id_fuzzy
  ]

  rent_dt[, c("property_id_fuzzy", "needs_review") := NULL]
}

setorder(rent_dt, property_id, date_of_transfer, transaction_id)

panel_dt <- rent_dt[!is.na(property_id)]

# Ensure unmatched transactions are treated as single-sale properties in the summary
rent_dt[,
  property_id_combined := fifelse(
    !is.na(property_id),
    property_id,
    sprintf("unmatched_%07d", .I)
  )
]

combined_summary_dt <- rent_dt[,
  .(sale_count = .N),
  by = property_id_combined
]

total_properties_combined <- nrow(combined_summary_dt)

repeat_summary_combined <- combined_summary_dt[,
  .(
    n_properties = .N,
    share_properties = .N / total_properties_combined
  ),
  by = sale_count
][order(sale_count)]

repeat_summary_combined <- as_tibble(repeat_summary_combined)

rent_dt[, property_id_combined := NULL]

repeat_summary_combined

panel_summary <- panel_dt[,
  .(
    n_sales = .N,
    first_sale = min(date_of_transfer, na.rm = TRUE),
    last_sale = max(date_of_transfer, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_flagged = sum(flagged_fuzzy, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  by = property_id
]

panel_summary[order(-n_sales)]
```
